name: Wild Rice and Fruit-Stuffed Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cut the squash in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds, placing the halves cut-side up in a baking dish.
3. Brush the squash with melted butter and season with salt and pepper.
4. Pour hot water into the baking dish until it reaches about halfway up the sides of the squash.
5. Cover with foil and bake for 45 minutes.
